# MeldUI

> A Vue 3 component library built on shadcn-vue with Tailwind CSS v4, providing consistent and beautiful UI components.

MeldUI is a design system monorepo that re-exports and customizes shadcn components. It consists of three packages: `@meldui/vue` for UI components, `@meldui/tabler-vue` for icons, and `@meldui/charts-vue` for data visualization. Uses Tailwind CSS v4 (NOT v3) with CSS-first configuration.

## Critical: Common Mistakes

1. **Using Tailwind CSS v3 syntax** - Do NOT create `tailwind.config.js`. Use CSS-first config with `@import "tailwindcss"`
2. **Wrong icon imports** - Icons are in `@meldui/tabler-vue`, NOT `@meldui/vue`
3. **Wrong chart imports** - Charts are in `@meldui/charts-vue`, NOT `@meldui/vue`
4. **Missing theme import** - Must import `@meldui/vue/themes/default` in your CSS
5. **Missing Tailwind source directive** - Add `@source "../node_modules/@meldui/vue/dist/*.mjs";`

## Packages

- [@meldui/vue](/docs/charts/installation): Core UI components
- [@meldui/tabler-vue](/docs/getting-started/icons): 5000+ Tabler icons with custom defaults
- [@meldui/charts-vue](/docs/charts/installation): Apache ECharts components

## Pages

- [Area Chart](/docs/charts/area-chart): Visualize volume and cumulative data with filled areas beneath lines.
- [Bar Chart](/docs/charts/bar-chart): Compare values across categories with vertical, horizontal, and stacked bars.
- [Chart Events](/docs/charts/events): Handle user interactions with chart click, hover, legend, and selection events.
- [Chart Theme Customization](/docs/charts/theme-customization): Customize chart appearance with CSS variables, color palettes, and dark mode.
- [Charts Installation](/docs/charts/installation): How to install and configure @meldui/charts-vue in your project.
- [Charts Overview](/docs/charts): A comprehensive charting library for Vue 3, built on ECharts with MeldUI theming and dark mode support.
- [Donut Chart](/docs/charts/donut-chart): A pie chart with a hollow center, ideal for displaying a summary metric.
- [Heatmap Chart](/docs/charts/heatmap-chart): Visualize density and intensity across two categorical or numeric dimensions.
- [Line Chart](/docs/charts/line-chart): Display trends and continuous data with line and step interpolation.
- [Mixed Chart](/docs/charts/mixed-chart): Combine multiple chart types (line, bar, area) in a single visualization.
- [Pie Chart](/docs/charts/pie-chart): Show proportions of a whole with a circular chart.
- [Radar Chart](/docs/charts/radar-chart): Compare multiple dimensions on a radial grid.
- [Scatter Chart](/docs/charts/scatter-chart): Plot correlations between two numeric variables.
- [Accordion](/docs/components/accordion): A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal or hide sections of content.
- [Alert](/docs/components/alert): Displays a callout message for important information with color variants.
- [Alert Dialog](/docs/components/alert-dialog): A modal confirmation dialog that interrupts the user for important decisions.
- [Aspect Ratio](/docs/components/aspect-ratio): Displays content within a desired aspect ratio.
- [Avatar](/docs/components/avatar): An image element with a fallback for representing the user.
- [Badge](/docs/components/badge): A small label for status indicators, categories, or counts.
- [Breadcrumb](/docs/components/breadcrumb): Navigation breadcrumbs showing the current page location in a hierarchy.
- [Button](/docs/components/button): Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.
- [Button Group](/docs/components/button-group): Groups multiple buttons together with consistent spacing and visual connection.
- [Calendar](/docs/components/calendar): A date picker calendar for selecting individual dates.
- [Card](/docs/components/card): A container for grouping related content with header, body, and footer sections.
- [Carousel](/docs/components/carousel): A carousel component for cycling through elements with navigation controls.
- [Checkbox](/docs/components/checkbox): A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and unchecked states.
- [Circular Progress](/docs/components/circular-progress): A circular progress indicator with customizable size, thickness, and color variants.
- [Collapsible](/docs/components/collapsible): An interactive component that expands and collapses content.
- [Combobox](/docs/components/combobox): An autocomplete input with a filterable dropdown list for selecting values.
- [Command](/docs/components/command): A command palette for searching and executing actions, similar to Cmd+K interfaces.
- [Context Menu](/docs/components/context-menu): A right-click context menu with items, groups, and sub-menus.
- [Dialog](/docs/components/dialog): A modal dialog that overlays content and requires user interaction.
- [Dot](/docs/components/dot): A small status indicator dot with color variants and animation effects.
- [Drawer](/docs/components/drawer): A touch-friendly drawer component that slides from the bottom of the screen.
- [Dropdown Menu](/docs/components/dropdown-menu): A menu that appears on trigger click with items, groups, checkboxes, and nested sub-menus.
- [Empty](/docs/components/empty): An empty state placeholder for when there is no content to display.
- [Field](/docs/components/field): A form field layout component with label, content, description, and error display.
- [File Upload](/docs/components/file-upload): A file upload component with drag and drop, previews, and progress tracking.
- [Form](/docs/components/form): Form components with vee-validate integration for validation and error handling.
- [Hover Card](/docs/components/hover-card): A rich content card that appears when hovering over a trigger element.
- [Input](/docs/components/input): A text input field for capturing user input.
- [Input Group](/docs/components/input-group): Groups an input with addons, buttons, and text elements.
- [Input OTP](/docs/components/input-otp): A one-time password input with individual character slots.
- [Item](/docs/components/item): A flexible list item component for displaying structured content with media, text, and actions.
- [Kbd](/docs/components/kbd): Displays keyboard key indicators for shortcuts and key combinations.
- [Label](/docs/components/label): An accessible label associated with form controls.
- [Menubar](/docs/components/menubar): A horizontal menu bar with dropdown menus, similar to desktop application menus.
- [Native Select](/docs/components/native-select): A styled native HTML select element.
- [Navigation Menu](/docs/components/navigation-menu): A complex navigation menu with rich content areas, suitable for site-wide navigation.
- [Number Field](/docs/components/number-field): A numeric input with increment and decrement buttons.
- [Pagination](/docs/components/pagination): Navigation controls for paginated content with page numbers, previous/next, and first/last buttons.
- [Pin Input](/docs/components/pin-input): A PIN code input with individual boxes for each character.
- [Popover](/docs/components/popover): A floating content panel that appears on trigger click.
- [Progress](/docs/components/progress): A horizontal progress bar indicating completion status.
- [Radio Group](/docs/components/radio-group): A set of radio buttons where only one can be selected at a time.
- [Range Calendar](/docs/components/range-calendar): A calendar for selecting date ranges with start and end dates.
- [Resizable](/docs/components/resizable): Resizable panel groups with draggable handles for flexible layouts.
- [Scroll Area](/docs/components/scroll-area): A custom scrollable area with styled scrollbars.
- [Select](/docs/components/select): A custom select component with keyboard navigation and grouping support.
- [Separator](/docs/components/separator): A visual divider between content sections.
- [Sheet](/docs/components/sheet): A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen.
- [Sidebar](/docs/components/sidebar): A complex sidebar navigation component with collapsible sections, menus, and responsive behavior.
- [Skeleton](/docs/components/skeleton): A placeholder loading animation for content that is still loading.
- [Slider](/docs/components/slider): A range slider for selecting numeric values with color variants.
- [Sonner](/docs/components/sonner): Toast notification system for success, error, and informational messages.
- [Spinner](/docs/components/spinner): An animated loading spinner indicator.
- [Stepper](/docs/components/stepper): A step-by-step progress indicator for multi-step workflows.
- [Switch](/docs/components/switch): A toggle switch control for boolean values with color variants.
- [Table](/docs/components/table): A semantic HTML table with consistent styling for displaying tabular data.
- [Tabs](/docs/components/tabs): Tabbed navigation with line and pill variants for organizing content.
- [Tags Input](/docs/components/tags-input): An input for managing multiple tags or keywords.
- [Textarea](/docs/components/textarea): A multi-line text input with optional auto-sizing support.
- [Toggle](/docs/components/toggle): A two-state button that can be either on or off.
- [Toggle Group](/docs/components/toggle-group): A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off, supporting single or multiple selection.
- [Tooltip](/docs/components/tooltip): A popup that displays information when hovering over an element.
- [Avatar Group](/docs/composites/avatar-group): Displays a stack of avatars with an overflow indicator.
- [Clipboard Copy](/docs/composites/clipboard-copy): A component for copying text to the clipboard with visual feedback.
- [Data Table](/docs/data-table): A powerful, feature-rich data table with server-side operations, filtering, sorting, pagination, row selection, column pinning, and keyboard navigation.
- [Data Table: Basic Usage](/docs/data-table/basic): Setting up a basic data table with sorting, pagination, and search.
- [Data Table: Column Pinning](/docs/data-table/pinning): Pin columns to the left or right edge for horizontal scroll tables.
- [Data Table: Columns & Cells](/docs/data-table/columns): Type-safe column definitions with createColumnHelper, cell renderers, and aggregation helpers.
- [Data Table: Filtering](/docs/data-table/filtering): Configure filter types, advanced mode with operators, and custom filter fields.
- [Data Table: Row Expansion](/docs/data-table/expansion): Expand rows to show detail content using the master-detail pattern.
- [Data Table: Selection & Actions](/docs/data-table/selection): Row selection with checkboxes, bulk actions, and per-row action menus.
- [Data Table: Server-Side](/docs/data-table/server-side): Server-side operation params, response format, URL state persistence, and the onServerSideChange callback.
- [Date Range Picker](/docs/composites/date-range-picker): A composite date picker with presets, calendar, and support for single or range date selection.
- [Mention](/docs/composites/mention): A rich text input that supports @-mention suggestions with customizable triggers and serialization.
- [Multi Select](/docs/composites/multi-select): A searchable multi-select dropdown with badge display, groups, and creatable options.
- [Relative Time](/docs/composites/relative-time): Displays a human-readable relative timestamp that updates automatically.
- [Timeline](/docs/composites/timeline): A vertical or horizontal timeline for displaying chronological events.
- [Common Patterns](/docs/examples): Real-world usage patterns and composition examples for building applications with MeldUI.
- [Dark Mode](/docs/getting-started/dark-mode): How to enable and configure dark mode in your MeldUI application.
- [Icons](/docs/getting-started/icons): MeldUI uses Tabler Icons with custom defaults for size and stroke, provided via the @meldui/tabler-vue package.
- [Installation](/docs/getting-started/installation): How to install and configure MeldUI in your Vue 3 project.
- [Introduction](/docs/getting-started): MeldUI is a Vue 3 component library built on shadcn-vue with Tailwind CSS v4, providing consistent and beautiful UI components.
- [Theming](/docs/getting-started/theming): Customize MeldUI's appearance using CSS variables with OKLCH colors and Tailwind CSS v4.
